member.name: T:Dreamine.Database.Abstractions.DatabaseConnectionOptions
member.summary: Provides connection settings for a Dreamine database provider.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Database.Abstractions.IDatabaseCommandExecutor
member.summary: Exposes raw SQL command execution operations.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Database.Abstractions.IDatabaseCommandExecutor.ExecuteScalar``1(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Executes a raw SQL scalar command.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Database.Abstractions.IDatabaseCommandExecutor.ExecuteScalarAsync``1(System.String,System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a raw SQL scalar command.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Database.Abstractions.IDatabaseConnection
member.summary: Exposes database provider identity and connection configuration.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Database.Abstractions.IDatabaseConnection.EnsureDatabaseExists
member.summary: Ensures the target database can be opened or created by the provider.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Database.Abstractions.IDatabaseConnection.EnsureDatabaseExistsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Ensures the target database can be opened or created by the provider.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Database.Abstractions.IDatabaseProvider
member.summary: Defines the full database provider surface supported by Dreamine providers.
member.remarks: New consumers should depend on the smallest role interface they need, such as , , , or . This interface remains as a compatibility facade for existing provider consumers.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Database.Abstractions.IDatabaseRepository
member.summary: Exposes mapped entity data manipulation operations.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Database.Abstractions.IDatabaseRepository.Insert``1(``0)
member.returns: True when at least one row was inserted.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Database.Abstractions.IDatabaseRepository.InsertAsync``1(``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.returns: True when at least one row was inserted.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Database.Abstractions.IDatabaseRepository.Update``1(``0)
member.returns: True when at least one row was updated.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Database.Abstractions.IDatabaseRepository.UpdateAsync``1(``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.returns: True when at least one row was updated.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Database.Abstractions.IDatabaseRepository.Delete``1(``0)
member.returns: True when at least one row was deleted.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Database.Abstractions.IDatabaseRepository.DeleteAsync``1(``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.returns: True when at least one row was deleted.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Database.Abstractions.IDatabaseSchemaProvider
member.summary: Exposes database schema and table-management operations.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Database.Abstractions.IDatabaseSchemaProvider.IsTableExists(System.String)
member.returns: True when the table exists; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Database.Abstractions.IDatabaseSchemaProvider.IsTableExistsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.returns: True when the table exists; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Database.Abstractions.IDatabaseSchemaProvider.IsTableExists``1
member.summary: Determines whether the mapped table for an entity type exists.
member.returns: True when the table exists; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Database.Abstractions.IDatabaseSchemaProvider.IsTableExistsAsync``1(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Determines whether the mapped table for an entity type exists.
member.returns: True when the table exists; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Database.Abstractions.IDatabaseSchemaProvider.CreateTable``1
member.summary: Creates the mapped table for an entity type when it does not exist.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Database.Abstractions.IDatabaseSchemaProvider.CreateTableAsync``1(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates the mapped table for an entity type when it does not exist.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation.
